title: Scripted Essentials
description: A lightweight essentials plugin featuring immortality commands, warp commands, and reduced armor durability drain. Simple, optimized, and perfect for SMP and survival servers.
body:
# Scripted Essentials

Scripted Essentials is a lightweight and optimized essentials plugin designed for SMP and survival Minecraft servers. It adds useful quality-of-life features and utility commands while keeping gameplay smooth, balanced, and close to vanilla.

The plugin includes immortality commands, a customizable warp system, and reduced armor durability drain to improve survival gameplay and reduce unnecessary grinding. Unlike large and bloated essentials plugins, Scripted Essentials focuses on simple, practical, and performance-friendly features that servers actually need.

## Features

* Immortality commands
* Custom warp system
* Reduced armor durability drain
* Lightweight and optimized
* Easy configuration support
* SMP and survival friendly
* Simple and clean command system
* Compatible with modern Paper/Spigot servers

Perfect for SMPs, survival worlds, community servers, and players looking for a clean essentials-style plugin with useful gameplay improvements.
